/usr/bin/c++ -std=c++17  -O3 -Wall -DNDEBUG -rdynamic CMakeFiles/set_to_serial_mode.dir/examples/set_to_serial_mode.cpp.o -o /home/lunabotics/TAMU_SEDS_Lunabotics/ros2_ws/src/unilidar_sdk2/unitree_lidar_sdk/bin/set_to_serial_mode   -L/home/lunabotics/TAMU_SEDS_Lunabotics/ros2_ws/src/unilidar_sdk2/unitree_lidar_sdk/lib/aarch64  -Wl,-rpath,/home/lunabotics/TAMU_SEDS_Lunabotics/ros2_ws/src/unilidar_sdk2/unitree_lidar_sdk/lib/aarch64 -Wl,-Bstatic -lunilidar_sdk2 -Wl,-Bdynamic
